prose: Fukui reactivity indices for benzaldehyde were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet). The cation (N−1) and anion (N+1) states were computed as doublets (multiplicity 2). Partial charges were obtained via the Mulliken scheme. Density fitting was NOT used (exact four-center integrals). Geometry was taken from the user-supplied .xyz file as-is (no re-optimization). All three SCFs converged; integrity trustworthy = true. sum(f+) = 1.0000; sum(f-) = 1.0000. No engine warnings. Headline value reported is the maximum f+ (most electrophilic site), at atom 3 (C, ring carbon adjacent to CHO group): f+ = 0.39938968. The most nucleophilic site is atom 1 (O, carbonyl oxygen): f- = 0.23839906. Output JSON: benzaldehyde_fukui_dft.json. Bar-chart plot written to the run directory.
